Off Calendar Jul-13-2015 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marilyn Young for Jan Monge.

Ms. Young reported that Mr. Monge is deceased, that she was notified by his girlfriend, that he was the only surviving heir of Mildred Monge, that the condo was sold, that the proceeds were transferred to Mr. Monge's estate account and then transferred to a joint account with his girlfriend, that there is only $180,000.00 in the estate which per his will would go to the girlfriend and that legally the money already belongs to her since it is in a joint account. Ms. Young suggests that she be appointed as special administrator to do a final inventory. The court requested that Ms. Young submit a proposed order and took the matter under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
